name: StaffAssignments
description: Linkage table mapping a staff user's email to a Site and their staff role at that site. NOT 1:1 — one email may have multiple rows (a staff member assigned to multiple sites). userEmail is stored trimmed + lowercased (canonical form used by usePersona() lookups). The app references UsersEntity by email per platform convention.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: userEmail
columns.description: Staff member's email, stored trimmed + lowercased

columns.name: siteId
columns.description: Site this staff member is assigned to
